rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved the task objective. It correctly identified two required changes: (1) patching the ray-head Service to expose port 8265, and (2) patching the Deployment to replace `--include-dashboard=false` with `--include-dashboard=true --dashboard-host=0.0.0.0` so the dashboard binds to all interfaces rather than loopback. The success criteria command returned HTTP 200, the oracle passed, and the regression sweep confirms stage_04 (dashboard_exposure) passes with both 'service/ray-head exposes port 8265' and 'dashboard endpoint returned HTTP 200'.
